stats.attachment_trust_note: Only modelled attachments were allowed. Ignored 7 zero-effect or unmodelled conversion row(s).
stats.build_reason_summary: Military Camo Headshots uses headshot damage for shots-to-kill, then rewards stability and handling so headshots are easier to repeat. At 100 HP this build models 21 damage per headshot hit and needs 5 shot(s) in the selected mixed fights profile.
stats.score_weight_summary: recoil 38% | ads ms 19% | sprint to fire ms 14% | bullet velocity 11% | range m 9% | practical ttk ms 6% | damage per mag 3%
stats.optic_status: Bowen X-25 IR was selected by the optimiser, not forced by a challenge lock.
stats.selected_attachment_notes: 18.7in Bowen Alleron Barrel [barrel] - range gain. Modelled effects: range +40%. || 3mW Motion Strike Laser [laser] - range gain. Modelled effects: range +19%. || LTI Stentorian Brake [muzzle] - stability gain. Modelled effects: fire rate +7%; horizontal recoil -20%. || Bowen X-25 IR [optic] - thermal optic, stability gain, ADS penalty. Modelled effects: ADS +5%; jump ADS +5%; gun kick -50%. || Sarsen Sprint Grip [rear_grip] - faster sprint-to-fire. Modelled effects: sprint-to-fire -38%; jump sprint-to-fire -37%.
stats.rejected_breakpoint_notes: 16.5in Greaves Bellum Barrel [barrel] raises head damage 21->24.7, but it still needs 5 shot(s) at 100 HP. The Oracle rejected the trade because recoil/practical TTK worsened (8.8->11.6, 373->378 ms).

rejected_headshot_breakpoint_notes: 16.5in Greaves Bellum Barrel [barrel] raises head damage 21->24.7, but it still needs 5 shot(s) at 100 HP. The Oracle rejected the trade because recoil/practical TTK worsened (8.8->11.6, 373->378 ms).

avoid_modes: Team Deathmatch if lobbies are slow or scattered
priorities: Play predictable objective traffic instead of chasing random spawns.
Hold chest-to-head height lanes and let enemies enter the reticle.
Prioritise recoil control, visual clarity, and flinch resistance over pure raw TTK.
Build around repeated objective contact and survivability.
Use cover around flags or hills rather than wide roaming routes.
Maximise attempts per minute. Do not waste time in low-engagement playlists.
